headline: Chubb Names Seshadri Iyer to Lead Global Operations, Technology and Digital Transformation
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) today announced that Seshadri (Sesh) Iyer has been appointed Executive Vice President, Chubb Group, Operations, Technology and Digital Transformation, effective April 6. He succeeds Julie Dillman, who is retiring on April 2 after nearly a decade at Chubb.
